final_text:
I searched the vault thoroughly. The claim concerns "Median implementation cycle," but no vault document contains that metric. The only value of 31 days for Q1 2026 belongs to "Median resolution time" in the operations review — a different metric (support case resolution, not customer implementation/onboarding cycle). Full-text searches for "implementation," "implementation cycle," and "median cycle days" returned no matches across all documents.
